tweets.text:
Hi, I’m Joshua Lorcy!

Pokemon VGC player & Community Ambassador with 6 years of tournament experience and 3 years casting grassroots and unofficial Pokemon events.

I enjoy breaking down gameplay while keeping broadcasts engaging for both new and experienced viewers.

DMs open!

There are some other really good options too though!

Mega Mawile and Mega Scrafty both pack an insane punch. Scrafty adds Fake Out + Double Intim while Mawile gets Sucker Punch

Maushold + Malamar has been trending on high ladder, and Basc, Gambit, Zardy. Sylv work on TR (10/11)

I personally think that Mega Camerupt with Sheer Force Ancient Power + Earth Power + Heat Wave and Mega Blastoise with Water Spout + Aura Sphere + Dark Pulse are both insanely good sweepers

With Helping Hand Farigiraf and making good reads you can kinda clear most teams (9/11)

Let’s talk the 6 Quivern is using! 

Vivillon is a cool supporting pick with Safety Goggles not in the game for fast sleep

Life Orb Inner Focus Mudsdale OHKOs Floette with Heavy Slam and has elite Ground Rock coverage

And Dark Glasses Incin packs a real punch! (7/11)

Reg M-B Spotlight: Hard Trick Room!

In a world where one of the top meta teams “Big 6” has tailwind and 0 defensive mons Trick Room seems like an increasingly strong option!

But Hard TR has been kinda MIA — yet it still got 2 teams in the Top 32 GCF! Let’s talk about TR! (1/11)
